differential_diagnoses: Viral exanthem with vasculitic features (e.g., enterovirus/adenovirus)
next_steps: Urgent skin biopsy for H&E and direct immunofluorescence (DIF)
Serial echocardiography to evaluate for coronary artery abnormalities
Laboratory evaluation including CBC, inflammatory markers (CRP, ESR), urinalysis, and blood cultures
Empiric management for suspected vasculitis while awaiting biopsy results
Strict monitoring for signs of systemic shock or organ involvement
